title: Crunchy Light Algerian Tofu Stir-fry
description: This earthy and crunchy dish features marinated tofu that is air-fried for a light, quick meal suitable for those following a fodmap-friendly diet.
instructions: Marinate tofu in lemon juice, garlic, and herbes de provence for about 15 minutes.
Remove tofu from marinade. Pat dry with paper towels and slice into thin strips if not already sliced.
Season tofu slices lightly with red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper.
Place marinated tofu in a single layer on air fryer tray and cook for 7-10 minutes until golden brown.
Meanwhile, chop onion finely and green pepper into matchsticks. Sauté onions and peppers in olive oil until soft.
Stir-fry the sautéed vegetables with sliced tofu and sesame seeds for an additional minute to coat.
Serve immediately with a side of fresh cucumber slices and lemon wedges.
